series.curator_notes: Split from Löwenzahn. These are the CLASSICS re-releases featuring Peter Lustig. They are distinct from the newer episodes (Episodes 1-17) which feature a different protagonist (Fritz Fuchs). The CLASSICS have different episode titles, different track counts, and are clearly marketed as a separate product line for fans of the original TV series with Peter Lustig.

verification.concerns: Minor note: Episode 4 (Der Schatz der alten Römer) returned an album_details error, but this appears to be a Spotify API issue / ID mismatch. The ID in the output was missing a character (7IRNGg0uop1vW8IkNDD44J vs 7IRNGg0uop1vW8Ik2DD44J). This may need manual verification but likely a data entry typo rather than a curation error.
